## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss ongoing projects, priorities, and next steps for content creation and client management.](https://fathom.video/share/zWDvVA9s-sxD6wFEeRd4Lj_zoevqdx_s?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on delivering value and ensuring results for clients before scaling operations](https://fathom.video/share/zWDvVA9s-sxD6wFEeRd4Lj_zoevqdx_s?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Ramp up content production capacity by onboarding more writers/editors](https://fathom.video/share/zWDvVA9s-sxD6wFEeRd4Lj_zoevqdx_s?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Explore adding subject matter experts (e.g. finance, legal) to review content](https://fathom.video/share/zWDvVA9s-sxD6wFEeRd4Lj_zoevqdx_s?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Investigate design resources for lead magnets and branded visuals](https://fathom.video/share/zWDvVA9s-sxD6wFEeRd4Lj_zoevqdx_s?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Capacity

  - [Onboarding 5 new writers, training them](https://fathom.video/share/zWDvVA9s-sxD6wFEeRd4Lj_zoevqdx_s?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Posting for lead editor/content manager role to manage writers](https://fathom.video/share/zWDvVA9s-sxD6wFEeRd4Lj_zoevqdx_s?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Considering hiring US-based managing editors instead of writers](https://fathom.video/share/zWDvVA9s-sxD6wFEeRd4Lj_zoevqdx_s?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Potentially pay higher rates for experienced editors](https://fathom.video/share/zWDvVA9s-sxD6wFEeRd4Lj_zoevqdx_s?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)

### Client Delivery and Results

  - [Prioritize delivering value and achieving results for clients](https://fathom.video/share/zWDvVA9s-sxD6wFEeRd4Lj_zoevqdx_s?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Once results are achieved, can scale operations](https://fathom.video/share/zWDvVA9s-sxD6wFEeRd4Lj_zoevqdx_s?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [For Ramp, pre-produce all 380 pages ahead of kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/zWDvVA9s-sxD6wFEeRd4Lj_zoevqdx_s?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Leverage Ramp's internal teams but account for their brand standards](https://fathom.video/share/zWDvVA9s-sxD6wFEeRd4Lj_zoevqdx_s?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)

### Visuals and Design

  - [Explore tools like Midjourney for branded visuals for Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/zWDvVA9s-sxD6wFEeRd4Lj_zoevqdx_s?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Need design talent for lead magnets/PDFs pitched to Home Base](https://fathom.video/share/zWDvVA9s-sxD6wFEeRd4Lj_zoevqdx_s?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Can be freelance designers initially](https://fathom.video/share/zWDvVA9s-sxD6wFEeRd4Lj_zoevqdx_s?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)

### Project Management

  - [Dedicated VA to upload content to client CMSs](https://fathom.video/share/zWDvVA9s-sxD6wFEeRd4Lj_zoevqdx_s?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Onboarding help for calendar management, metrics tracking](https://fathom.video/share/zWDvVA9s-sxD6wFEeRd4Lj_zoevqdx_s?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
